There’s one final flavor of append() that works with iterators:string& string::append (InputIterator start, InputIterator end)Appends all characters from the range [start, end) (including start up to but not including end)Returns *this so it can be “chained”.Throws a length_error exception if the result exceeds the maximum number of characters.Next lesson22.7std::string insertingBack to table of contentsPrevious lesson22.5std::string assignment and swapping
